meta.title: 四葉不動産 | Beyond language and industry barriers — finding your home.
meta.description: A real estate agency led by a former journalist and licensed scrivener. With 5-language support and a professional network of legal and labor experts, we provide one-stop service from housing to legal matters.

home.heroSubtitle1: With the information network and connections of a former journalist,
home.heroSubtitle2: we support your real estate needs.

strengths.title: Approachable Service
strengths.subtitle: Approachable Service
strengths.description: Zero formality. With the listening skills of a former journalist, we create an atmosphere where you can talk freely about anything.

strengths.title: 5 Languages
strengths.subtitle: Multilingual
strengths.description: Japanese, Chinese, Taiwanese Mandarin, Thai, and English. Consult with us without worrying about language barriers.

strengths.title: Firsthand Experience
strengths.subtitle: Lived Experience
strengths.description: Having searched for homes multiple times during overseas postings, we know firsthand the challenges of finding housing as a foreigner.

strengths.title: A Real Estate Agency with an Administrative Scrivener
strengths.subtitle: Licensed Scrivener
strengths.description: Visa and residence status procedures are handled in-house. We provide a one-stop solution for real estate and legal matters.

strengths.title: Expert Network
strengths.subtitle: Expert Network
strengths.description: We collaborate with tax accountants, judicial scriveners, labor consultants, and other specialists. Complex cases are handled as a team.

strengths.title: Information Network of a Former Journalist
strengths.subtitle: Information Network
strengths.description: With extensive connections and investigative skills, we deliver property information that is not easily available to the public.

items.title: Rental Support
items.subtitle: Rental
items.description: From apartment hunting to screening and contracts — one-stop support

items.title: Sales Support
items.subtitle: Sales
items.description: Brokerage for home purchases and investment properties. We explain everything clearly, even for first-time buyers

items.title: Property Management
items.subtitle: Management
items.description: We manage properties on behalf of owners. Tenant relations handled with care

items.title: Multilingual Support
items.subtitle: Multilingual
items.description: Services available in Japanese, English, and Chinese (Traditional/Simplified). International residents are welcome

message.paragraph1: As a newspaper journalist, I traveled the world and lived in 5 countries. The information-gathering skills, negotiation expertise, and broad network I built along the way — I am convinced these are powerful assets in the real estate world as well.
message.paragraph2: When you have a real estate concern, I want to be someone you can talk to easily. Whether it's buying, selling, renting, or property management — no question is too small. Walking alongside each client to find the best answer together. That is the promise of 四葉不動産.
message.title: 四葉不動産 Representative

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.metaDescription: Rental, sales, property management, and multilingual support. A full list of 四葉不動産 services.
servicesPage.heroDescription1: From leasing, sales, and management to multilingual support.
servicesPage.heroDescription2: We are here to help with all your real estate needs.

sections.title: Rental Support
sections.subtitle: Rental Support
sections.lead: Leave everything from apartment hunting to move-in to us.
sections.description: Leveraging the information network and connections of a former journalist, we introduce properties that are not easily available to the public. We work together to find the right home for you.
points: Consultation on your requirements & property search

sections.title: Sales Support
sections.subtitle: Sales Support
sections.lead: Whether buying a home or investing — we ensure a satisfying deal.
sections.description: Buying or selling real estate is a major life decision. We leverage extensive information and our expert network to help you make the best choice.
points: Coordination with tax accountants & judicial scriveners

sections.title: Property Management
sections.subtitle: Property Management
sections.lead: We take care of your valuable assets with responsibility.
sections.description: From tenant recruitment to building maintenance, we lighten the burden on property owners. We respond promptly to issues and maintain a management system you can rely on.

sections.title: Multilingual Support
sections.subtitle: Multilingual Support
sections.lead: Services available in Japanese, English, and Chinese (Traditional/Simplified).
sections.description: Our representative has lived in 5 countries. Because he knows firsthand the challenges of searching for a home as a foreigner, he can provide detailed and attentive support.
points: Property introductions & contract explanations in 4 languages

faq.question: What services does 四葉不動産 offer?
faq.answer: We offer four services: rental support, sales support, property management, and multilingual support (Japanese, English, Chinese Traditional/Simplified).

faq.question: Can foreigners rent an apartment?
faq.answer: Yes. 四葉不動産 provides specialized support for international residents in 5 languages. Our representative has lived in 5 countries and understands the challenges of finding housing as a foreigner.

faq.question: What areas do you cover?
faq.answer: We primarily cover Bunkyo-ku, Tokyo, and offer properties throughout all 23 wards of Tokyo. Our nearest station is Myogadani on the Tokyo Metro Marunouchi Line.

legal.name: 四葉行政書士事務所
legal.description: Subsidies & grants, residence status & visas, legal procedures
legal.tagline: Subsidies, visas, and company formation — all in one place.
legal.footerDescription1: Subsidies, visas, and company formation — all in one place.
legal.footerDescription2: Combining real estate and legal expertise, we provide comprehensive support for your business and daily life procedures.

meta.title: 四葉行政書士事務所 | Subsidies, Grants & Visa Applications
meta.description: Subsidies & grants, residence status & visa applications, company formation, and various permits. 四葉パートナーズ's administrative scrivener office provides one-stop legal procedure support.

homePage.title: 四葉行政書士事務所
homePage.metaDescription: Subsidies & grants, residence status & visa applications, company formation, and various permits. 四葉パートナーズ's administrative scrivener office provides one-stop legal procedure support.
homePage.heroDescription1: From subsidy and grant applications to residence status, visas, company formation, and permits.
homePage.heroDescription2: With our one-stop real estate and legal services, we support your business and daily life.

services.title: Subsidies & Grants
services.description: We support everything from document preparation to approval for subsidies such as the Business Restructuring Subsidy and the Small Business Sustainability Subsidy. We have the expertise to maximize your approval rate.

services.title: Residence Status & Visa Applications
services.description: We support the preparation of documents needed to obtain, renew, or change residence statuses, including work visas, business manager visas, and spouse visas. With 5-language support, we can communicate directly with foreign applicants.

services.title: Company & Corporation Formation
services.description: We support incorporation procedures for stock companies (KK) and limited liability companies (GK). From articles of incorporation to registration procedures, we offer a one-stop service combined with real estate (office search). Registration is handled by our partner judicial scrivener.

services.title: Various Permit Applications
services.description: We support the acquisition of permits required for your business, including construction business permits, restaurant business permits, and secondhand dealer permits.

services.title: Inheritance, Wills & Trust Support
services.description: We support all aspects of inheritance procedures, including will preparation, estate division agreements, and civil trust (family trust) design. Real estate inheritance is handled in coordination with 四葉不動産.

services.title: Contracts & Document Preparation
services.description: We prepare and review various contracts, draft certified mail, and create other legal documents required for your business.

homePage.representativeBio1: Drawing on the investigative and writing skills honed as a newspaper journalist, I handle a wide range of services from subsidy applications to permit procedures. Subsidy and grant applications in particular depend on how well you convey your business plan — and my journalism background produces persuasive applications.
homePage.representativeBio2: Additionally, with experience living in 5 countries and multilingual capabilities, I have particular strength in residence status and visa applications for foreign nationals. The ability to provide a one-stop solution combining real estate (四葉不動産) and legal services is our office's greatest advantage.
homePage.representativeTitle: Chief Administrative Scrivener (Gyoseishoshi)　Registration No.: 第25087022号
homePage.oneStopTitle: The Advantage of the 四葉 Group
homePage.oneStopDescription1: Real estate, administrative scrivener, and labor consultant working together.
homePage.oneStopDescription2: We never pass your concerns from one office to another.

groupBusinesses.name: 四葉社会保険労務士法人

homePage.ctaDescription: Subsidies, grants, visa applications, company formation — feel free to ask about anything.

faq.question: What are the benefits of hiring an administrative scrivener for subsidy applications?
faq.answer: We leverage the writing skills of a former journalist to create persuasive applications. For subsidy applications where how you present your business plan is key to approval, journalism experience is a significant advantage.

faq.question: Do you handle visa applications for foreign nationals?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle the acquisition, renewal, and change of various residence statuses including work visas, business manager visas, and spouse visas. With 5-language support, we can communicate directly with the foreign applicant.

faq.question: Can I consult about both real estate and legal matters at the same time?
faq.answer: Yes. Within the 四葉パートナーズ group, the real estate division (四葉不動産) and the administrative scrivener office work together, so we can handle things like office lease contracts and company formation procedures in one place.

meta.title: 四葉社会保険労務士法人 | Social Insurance, Labor & Subsidies
meta.titleTemplate: %s | 四葉社会保険労務士法人
meta.description: Social insurance & labor insurance procedures, work rules creation, subsidy applications, and labor consulting. 四葉パートナーズ's labor consulting firm provides comprehensive HR and labor support for businesses.

homePage.title: 四葉社会保険労務士法人
homePage.metaDescription: Social insurance & labor insurance procedures, work rules creation, subsidy applications, and labor consulting. 四葉パートナーズ's labor consulting firm provides comprehensive HR and labor support for businesses.
homePage.heroDescription1: From social insurance and labor insurance procedures to work rules, subsidy applications, and labor consulting.
homePage.heroDescription2: Comprehensive support for all your business challenges related to people.

services.title: Social Insurance & Labor Insurance Procedures
services.description: We accurately handle complex insurance procedures such as enrollment/withdrawal notifications, standard remuneration assessments, and annual updates, reducing the burden on business owners.

services.title: Subsidy Applications
services.description: We support applications for subsidies available to businesses, such as the Career Advancement Subsidy and the Work-Life Balance Support Subsidy. In coordination with our administrative scrivener office, we also cover other grants.

services.title: Work Rules & Internal Regulations
services.description: We create and review work rules that match your company's actual situation. We also provide ongoing support for compliance with legal amendments.

services.title: Payroll Processing
services.description: We accurately handle monthly payroll calculations, from social insurance premiums, income tax, and resident tax calculations to payslip preparation.

services.title: Labor Consulting
services.description: We address day-to-day labor issues including employee disputes, harassment prevention, and work-style reform compliance.

services.title: Labor Audits & Compliance
services.description: We handle responses to labor standards bureau inspections and provide labor compliance reviews and improvement recommendations.

homePage.representativeBio1: The most important element in business management is people. Creating an environment where employees can work with peace of mind supports business growth. From social insurance and labor insurance procedures to work rules and subsidy utilization, we provide broad support for corporate HR and labor matters.
homePage.representativeBio2: We receive many inquiries about employing foreign nationals. By coordinating with our administrative scrivener office (residence status) and real estate division (company housing search), we can provide one-stop support from hiring to retention — a key strength of the 四葉 group.
homePage.representativeTitle: Certified Social Insurance and Labor Consultant (Sharoushi)　第202500525号
homePage.oneStopTitle: The Advantage of the 四葉 Group
homePage.oneStopDescription1: Real estate, administrative scrivener, and labor consultant working together.
homePage.oneStopDescription2: We never pass your concerns from one office to another.

groupBusinesses.name: 四葉社会保険労務士法人

homePage.ctaDescription: Social insurance, work rules, subsidies — feel free to ask about anything.

faq.question: What are the benefits of hiring a labor consultant?
faq.answer: We accurately handle specialized HR and labor tasks including social insurance and labor insurance procedures, work rules creation and review, and subsidy applications. We reduce the burden on business owners while ensuring legal compliance.

faq.question: Can you help with employing foreign nationals?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle social insurance procedures and labor management for foreign employees. In coordination with our group's administrative scrivener office (residence status) and real estate division (company housing search), we provide one-stop support from hiring to retention.

faq.question: Do you also support subsidy applications?
faq.answer: Yes, we support applications for various subsidies available to businesses, including the Career Advancement Subsidy and the Work-Life Balance Support Subsidy. In coordination with our administrative scrivener office, we also cover other grants.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy

collection.title: 1. Collection of Personal Information
collection.content: 四葉パートナーズ (hereinafter "the Company") may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and address through contact forms, phone calls, emails, and other means.

purpose.title: 2. Purpose of Use
purpose.content: Collected personal information will be used for the following purposes:
items: Providing services related to real estate transactions, administrative procedures, and labor consulting

thirdParty.title: 3. Disclosure to Third Parties
thirdParty.content: We will not disclose personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.

security.title: 4. Security Measures
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to prevent the leakage, loss, or damage of personal information.

inquiry.title: 5. Inquiries
inquiry.content: For inquiries regarding the handling of personal information, please contact us at:
inquiry.contactInfo: 四葉パートナーズ　TEL: 03-6161-9428

application.title: Article 1 (Scope of Application)
application.content: These Terms of Use set forth the conditions for the use of the website (hereinafter "the Site") operated by 四葉パートナーズ (hereinafter "the Company").

prohibited.title: Article 2 (Prohibited Activities)
prohibited.content: Users shall not engage in the following activities when using the Site:
items: Activities that violate laws or public order and morals
Activities that infringe upon the rights of the Company or third parties
Activities that interfere with the operation of the Site

disclaimer.title: Article 3 (Disclaimer)
disclaimer.content: The Company does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of the information published on the Site. The Company shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of the Site.

changes.title: Article 4 (Changes)
changes.content: The Company may modify these Terms of Use as necessary. The revised Terms shall take effect upon being published on the Site.
